news.title:
India's nuclear push creates long-term opportunities for engineering firms like L&T, BHEL, focusing on indigenization.
L&T faces near-term challenges due to Middle East tensions but may benefit from rebuilding demand medium-term; valuations remain a concern.
news.summary:

news.title:
India plans 100 airports, 200 helipads to boost regional connectivity, benefiting stocks like HAL, GMR, and others.
Key beneficiaries include HAL, GMR Airports, IndiGo, L&T, and Adani Enterprises due to growth in aviation infrastructure.

news.title:
L&T shares enter bear market, down 22% from 52-week high; affected by Iran war.

news.title:
